zh.Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Strathearn於1248年3月20日出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn24歲，母親Margery de Muschamp24歲。她於1269年與Nicholas de Graham在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Strathearn于1248年3月20日出生在苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn24岁，母亲Margery de Muschamp24岁。她于1269年与Nicholas de Graham在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Strathearn was born on 20 March 1248, in Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn, was 24 and her mother, Margery de Muschamp, was 24. She married Nicholas de Graham in 1269, in Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1318, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Strathearn est née le 20 mars 1248, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margery de Muschamp, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Graham en 1269, à Abercorn, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland: Abercorn, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Strathearn am 20. März 1248 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn 24 und ihre Mutter Margery de Muschamp 24. Sie hat 1269 in Abercorn, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Nicholas de Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Strathearn è nata il il 20 marzo 1248 nel Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margery de Muschamp, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Graham nel 1269, nel Abercorn, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1318, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Strathearnが1248年3月20日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Malise 5th Earl of Strathearnは24歳，母Margery de Muschampは24歳であった。1269年にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンアバーコルンでNicholas de Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Strathearn(이)가 1248년 3월 20일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Muschamp(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1269년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 압르코른에서 Nicholas de Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Strathearn nasceu em 20 de março de 1248, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Muschamp, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Graham em 1269, em Abercorn, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ro.Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland: Abercorn, West Lothian, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Strathearn родилась 20 марта 1248 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Muschamp, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Graham в 1269 г. в местности абиркорн, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Strathearn nació el 20 de marzo de 1248, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margery de Muschamp, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Graham en 1269, en Abercorn, West Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1318, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
